mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_tag_group (topic_id, name, color, is_exclusive, is_required, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{topicId}, #{name}, #{color}, #{isExclusive}, #{isRequired}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_tag_group WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_tag_group WHERE topic_id = #{topicId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_tag_group WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND name = #{name}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_tag_value (group_id, `value`, color, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{value}, #{color}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_tag_value WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_tag_value WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_tag_value WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND `value` = #{value}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM material_tag WHERE tag_group_key = #{groupKey}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM material_tag WHERE tag_group_key = #{groupKey} AND tag_value = #{value}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT material_id FROM material_tag WHERE tag_group_key = #{groupKey} GROUP BY material_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT tag_value) > 1 ) t
SELECT id FROM user_tag_group WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND is_required = 1
